data.body: Clarified registration structure: there are TWO registrations for this skill — (1) a qualified 'dso:fix-bug' entry that resolves correctly and appears in the skills list with a clean description, and (2) an unqualified 'fix-bug' wrapper stub with a bash guard trigger ('!bash -c timeout 3 claude plugin list...'). The 'Unknown skill: dso:fix-bug' error suggests the Skill tool is routing through the unqualified stub's bash guard rather than the qualified registration, and the guard is failing. Fix direction: investigate why Skill tool invocation of 'dso:fix-bug' hits the unqualified stub path instead of the direct qualified registration.
